market_context:
Cohort size: 50 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £104.90
Median 90-day occupancy: 48.9%
Median photo count: 23

title_variants: Stunning Cathedral Views – Central Sheffield Apt
Cozy 4‑Guest Flat with City Views & Fast Wi‑Fi
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to your Sheffield home base – a bright, modern apartment perched in the city centre with unrivalled cathedral views. Perfect for up to four guests, the space features a comfortable bedroom and a plush sofa bed in the living area, giving you flexible sleeping arrangements. The open‑plan living room opens onto a large window framing the historic cathedral, offering a picturesque backdrop for morning coffee or an evening unwind. Cook your favourite meals in the fully‑equipped kitchen, complete with all the essentials, and enjoy meals at the dedicated dining nook. Stay connected with high‑speed Wi‑Fi and unwind with a flat‑screen TV and Bluetooth sound system. The sleek bathroom provides hot water, shower gel and premium toiletries, while the bedroom is dressed in fresh linens and equipped with ample storage. For your convenience, a washing machine and tumble dryer are on‑site, and the apartment includes a hairdryer, iron and drying rack. Parking is available on the street for £10 per 24 hours. With central heating, portable fans and smoke alarm for safety, you’ll feel right at home the moment you step in. Explore Sheffield’s attractions, restaurants and nightlife right outside your door – we can’t wait to welcome you!
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a high‑resolution living‑room shot that captures the cathedral view as the cover photo – it instantly showcases the unique view and central location that set this listing apart.
key_diagnosis: Rate mismatch: £128/night is 22% above the Sheffield median (£104.90) while occupancy is only 27.2% (median 48.9%); consider lowering the nightly rate to boost bookings.
Photo shortfall: 17 photos versus the market median of 23; add at least 6 more images, especially exterior and view‑focused shots, to meet cohort standards.
Safety gaps: No exterior security cameras or carbon‑monoxide alarm; installing these two safety features can increase guest confidence and improve occupancy.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your nightly rate of £128 is 22% above the Sheffield median, yet your 90‑day occupancy is only 27% versus the market’s 49% – a clear opportunity to earn more by adjusting price and presentation.
